title: MobCountMod Updated
description: Updated version of MobCountMod for fabric 1.21.4+. Counts entities in a region around you.
body:
Updated version of [MobCountMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mobcountmod).

# MobCountMod

Shows under the categories passive and hostile entity each entity with a count next to the name and a total count

## Default keybinds
- Config keybind: P + C
- Toggle hostile entities counter: O
- Toggle passive entities counter: P
- Increase passive entities radius: P + Up Arrow
- Decrease passive entities radius: P + Down Arrow
- Increase hostile entities radius: O + Up Arrow
- Decrease hostile entities radius: O + Down Arrow
